sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (start_date DateTime, end_date DateTime);
SELECT dateDiff('day', start_date, end_date) AS day_difference FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET end_date = toDateTime('2021-01-08 00:00:00') WHERE start_date = toDateTime('2021-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT dateDiff('hour', start_date, end_date) AS hour_difference FROM test_dates WHERE start_date < end_date;
